source_quote: Paper reports decisional conflict (DCS) outcomes at 1-month, not decision regret. Regret is mentioned as a 6-month secondary objective but not reported in this paper.

Decision regret scores did not differ significantly between usual-care and intervention sites. Only 85 (18.9%) of 396 patients offered a choice completed the decision regret questionnaire. Numeric values are in supplementary Table S4, not in the main paper.
